---
title: "Stop Incorrect Comparisons in End-to-End Relation Extraction"
description: "Taillé et al at EMNLP 2020 — what are we measuring, what are we comparing to, what's not explicated."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-01-18"
categories: [NLP, paper, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Stop incorrect comparisons in end-to-end RE. Image from [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2009.10684).](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Bruno Taillé, Vincent Guigue, Geoffrey Scoutheeten and patrick gallinari asked these important questions:

* What are we measuring?
* What are we comparing to?
* What are not explicated in the literature?

We should have more papers like this!

Let's Stop Incorrect Comparisons in End-to-end Relation Extraction! <https://arxiv.org/abs/2009.10684>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_nlp-emnlp2020-activity-6757076242887000064-tAtl).*
